parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: '00_error_handler', event_type: 'WORKFLOW_EXECUTION_FAILED', status: 'FAILED', severity: 'WARNING', workflow_name: ($json.workflow && $json.workflow.name) || 'unknown_workflow', node_name: ($json.execution && $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted) || 'unknown_node', error_message: ($json.execution && $json.execution.error && $json.execution.error.message) || 'execution_failed', thing_id: $env.PRIMARY_THING_ID || 'building:floor1:elevator', action: 'OBSERVE', details: { execution_id: ($json.execution && $json.execution.id) || null, execution_url: ($json.execution && $json.execution.url) || null, mode: ($json.execution && $json.execution.mode) || null, last_node: ($json.execution && $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted) || null }, timestamp: $now.toISO() }) }}
